description_for_human: Toolset for the Sovereign MCP server with full tool definitions.
description_for_model: Provides a variety of tools for memory management, code analysis, session management, project context, and more.

tools.name: bb7_adaptive_learning
tools.description: Adapt recommendations to user behavior patterns.

tools.name: bb7_analyze_code_complete
tools.description: Complete code analysis with AST parsing, metrics, and security analysis

file_path.description: Path to the Python file to analyze

tools.name: bb7_analyze_project_structure
tools.description: Analyze and summarize project structure in a format optimized for LLM understanding.

tools.name: bb7_analyze_workflow_patterns
tools.description: Analyze workflow patterns and identify optimization opportunities.

time_range_days.description: How many recent days to include in analysis.

tools.name: bb7_append_file
tools.description: Append content to a file.

path.description: The absolute path to the file to append to.

content.description: The content to append to the file.

tools.name: bb7_auto_memory_stats
tools.description: Get the statistics of auto-captured memories for the current session.

tools.name: bb7_auto_session_resume
tools.description: Recommend whether to resume existing sessions or start a new one.

user_intent.description: Optional user intent to improve recommendation quality.

tools.name: bb7_capture_insight
tools.description: Enhanced insight capture with auto-memory and relationship tracking.

concept.description: The concept the insight is related to.

tools.name: bb7_check_url_status
tools.description: Check if a URL is accessible and get basic info.

tools.name: bb7_click_element
tools.description: 🖱️ Click on visual elements with intelligent targeting, multiple click types, and precise positioning. Perfect for UI automation, testing workflows, and interactive debugging. Supports various click types with smart element detection and coordinate validation.

tools.name: bb7_cognitive_optimization
tools.description: Suggest cognitive strategies to improve focus and decision quality.

focus_area.description: Optional focus area such as creativity or debugging.

tools.name: bb7_cross_session_analysis
tools.description: Analyze patterns across multiple sessions.

days_back.description: The number of days back to analyze.

tools.name: bb7_download_file
tools.description: Download a file from URL to local filesystem.

url.description: The URL to download the file from.

filename.description: The name to save the file as.

headers.description: A dictionary of headers to send with the request.

tools.name: bb7_exo_bootstrap
tools.description: Bootstrap capability-aware context for the exoskeleton control loop.

tools.name: bb7_exo_briefing
tools.description: Generate a natural-language capability narrative with proven workflows, recommendations, and health warnings for the given intent.

intent.description: The user-facing goal or task description.

tools.name: bb7_exo_category_specific_tools
tools.description: List tools in a category with reliability priors.

tools.name: bb7_exo_execute_step
tools.description: Record a step execution in a checkpointed plan. Call AFTER running the tool to log the outcome. Checkpoints persist across crashes.

tool_name.description: Tool that was executed (auto-resolved from chain if omitted).

result_summary.description: Brief summary of the step outcome.

tools.name: bb7_exo_get_recent_activity
tools.description: Get recent activity from all AI instances - call at session start to sync context with other AIs. Returns recent tool executions, discovered macros, and active workflows.

limit.description: Number of recent events to return (default 10).

tools.name: bb7_exo_kpi_report
tools.description: Generate a KPI report for one or all active plans. Shows completion rate, success rate, throughput, health assessment, and aggregate stats.

plan_id.description: Specific plan to report on (omit for all).

tools.name: bb7_exo_list_tool_categories
tools.description: List canonical capability categories and counts.

tools.name: bb7_exo_plan
tools.description: Generate candidate tool chains with confidence and fallback.

tools.name: bb7_exo_preemptive_recovery
tools.description: Analyse a planned workflow for failure risks before execution and suggest alternatives for weak links.

intent.description: The task intent to plan for.

risk_tolerance.description: Risk tolerance: conservative, moderate, or aggressive.

tools.name: bb7_exo_reflect
tools.description: Reflect outcomes and update tool/chain priors.

tools_used.description: Executed tools as a list or comma-separated string.

tools.name: bb7_exo_resume_plan
tools.description: Resume a checkpointed plan from where it left off. Returns next tool to execute and full progress state. Omit plan_id to list all plans.

plan_id.description: Plan identifier to resume (omit to list all).

tools.name: bb7_exo_route
tools.description: Intent-conditioned retrieval with semantic and graph scoring.

tools.name: bb7_exo_route_focused
tools.description: Progressive-disclosure routing: top-N tools with one-liner descriptions and expansion hint.

tools.name: bb7_exo_state
tools.description: Inspect exoskeleton state, priors, and discovered macros.

tools.name: bb7_extract_links
tools.description: Extract all links from a webpage.

url.description: The URL to extract links from.

tools.name: bb7_fetch_url
tools.description: Fetch content from a URL.

url.description: The URL to fetch content from.

headers.description: A dictionary of headers to send with the request.

timeout.description: The timeout for the request in seconds.

tools.name: bb7_find_on_screen
tools.description: 🔍 Find visual elements on screen using intelligent pattern matching, color detection, and coordinate identification. Perfect for UI automation, testing, and visual debugging. Provides precise element location with confidence scoring and multiple matching strategies.

target.description: What to find (text, color, or description of visual element)

tools.name: bb7_get_code_metrics
tools.description: Generate code metrics and statistics in LLM-friendly format.

tools.name: bb7_get_command_history
tools.description: 📜 View command execution history with performance analysis, success rates, and usage patterns. Perfect for reviewing recent development activities, analyzing command performance, and identifying frequently used commands for automation opportunities. Provides insights into command efficiency and suggests optimizations.

limit.description: Maximum number of commands to show

tools.name: bb7_get_execution_audit
tools.description: Get Python execution audit log with security events

limit.description: Maximum number of audit entries to return

tools.name: bb7_get_file_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a file or directory.

path.description: The absolute path to the file or directory.

tools.name: bb7_get_project_dependencies
tools.description: Extract and summarize project dependencies in LLM-friendly format.

tools.name: bb7_get_recent_changes
tools.description: Get recent Git changes in LLM-friendly format.

days.description: Number of days to look back for changes.

tools.name: bb7_get_session_insights
tools.description: Get comprehensive insights about a session.

session_id.description: The ID of the session to get insights for.

tools.name: bb7_get_session_summary
tools.description: Get a detailed summary of a specific session.

session_id.description: The ID of the session to get the summary for.

tools.name: bb7_get_system_info
tools.description: 💻 Get comprehensive system information including hardware specs, OS details, running processes, disk usage, memory utilization, and network status. Perfect for troubleshooting, performance monitoring, and understanding your development environment. Provides actionable insights for system optimization and resource management.

tools.name: bb7_intelligent_automation
tools.description: Identify automation opportunities and suggest workflows.

learning_mode.description: Enable adaptive learning while recommending automations.

tools.name: bb7_intelligent_tool_guide
tools.description: Map user intent to a recommended set of tools and workflow steps.

tools.name: bb7_journal_add_outcome
tools.description: Retrospectively record what happened as a result of a thought or decision. For decisions, sets status to validated or invalidated. Enables learning from past choices across sessions.

entry_id.description: Journal entry ID (8-char hex from prior record/capture call).

validated.description: True=confirmed correct, False=was wrong, omit=unknown yet.

tools.name: bb7_journal_capture_decision
tools.description: Record a decision with full provenance: rationale, alternatives considered, constraints, risk assessment, and success criteria. Creates an auditable decision trail that survives session boundaries.

alternatives.description: Comma-separated or JSON array of alternatives considered.

constraints.description: Comma-separated or JSON array of constraints that shaped this decision.

risk_assessment.description: What could go wrong with this decision.

success_criteria.description: How to know if this decision was correct.

linked_memories.description: Memory keys relevant to this decision.

linked_files.description: File paths relevant to this decision.

tools.name: bb7_journal_detect_conflicts
tools.description: Find decisions that may contradict each other on the same topic. Uses BM25 similarity + negation-word heuristic. Empty topic scans all decisions.

topic.description: Optional topic to focus conflict detection (empty = scan all decisions).

tools.name: bb7_journal_generate_retrospective
tools.description: Generate a structured retrospective report for a time period or topic. Includes decision outcomes, validated/invalidated counts, recurring themes, and actionable recommendations.

topic.description: Optional topic filter for the retrospective.

tools.name: bb7_journal_get_decision_trail
tools.description: Get the chronological decision history for a topic. Uses BM25 to find relevant decisions ordered by creation time. Detects potential contradictions in the trail.

topic.description: Topic or keyword to trace decisions for.

tools.name: bb7_journal_get_reasoning_chain
tools.description: Retrieve the full reasoning chain for an entry: the entry itself plus all linked thoughts, decisions, and their outcomes. Useful for understanding the complete context of a decision.

tools.name: bb7_journal_linked_entries
tools.description: Reverse lookup: given a memory key, return all journal entries that linked to it.

memory_key.description: The memory store key to look up.

tools.name: bb7_journal_record_thought
tools.description: Record a thought, insight, hypothesis, observation, or question in the Thought Journal. Captures the *reasoning* behind actions with confidence level, context, linked memories, and files. Solves AI amnesia — why was this decision made?

context.description: Situational context that prompted this thought.

linked_memories.description: Memory keys from bb7_memory_store to link.

linked_files.description: File paths relevant to this thought.

tools.name: bb7_journal_search
tools.description: BM25-ranked full-text search across all journal entries. Filter by entry type (thought, decision, insight, etc.).

tools.name: bb7_journal_stats
tools.description: Get statistics about the Thought Journal: entry counts by type, decision statuses, outcome validation rates, BM25 index health, and most-referenced entries.

tools.name: bb7_journal_surface_relevant
tools.description: Proactively surface journal entries most relevant to current context. Applies a 1.5x recency boost to entries from the last 7 days. Call at session start alongside bb7_memory_surface_context.

context_text.description: Current work context, task description, or code snippet.

tools.name: bb7_learned_patterns
tools.description: Get the learned patterns from sessions.

tools.name: bb7_link_memory_to_session
tools.description: Link a memory key to the current session.

memory_key.description: The key of the memory to link.

tools.name: bb7_list_directory
tools.description: List contents of a directory with detailed information.

path.description: The absolute path to the directory to list.

tools.name: bb7_list_processes
tools.description: 📊 List and analyze running processes with intelligent filtering, resource usage analysis, and performance insights. Perfect for troubleshooting resource issues, monitoring system performance, and identifying processes that may be affecting development work. Provides actionable recommendations for process management and optimization.

limit.description: Maximum number of processes to show

tools.name: bb7_list_sessions
tools.description: List all sessions with optional status filter.

status.description: The status to filter sessions by.

limit.description: The maximum number of sessions to return.

tools.name: bb7_log_event
tools.description: Enhanced event logging with auto-memory formation.

event_type.description: The type of event to log.

details.description: A dictionary of additional details about the event.

tools.name: bb7_memory_analyze_entry
tools.description: Analyze a memory entry and create connections.

key.description: The key of the memory entry.

value.description: The value of the memory entry.

source.description: The source of the memory entry.

tools.name: bb7_memory_bulk_store
tools.description: Atomically store multiple memory entries in a single disk write. entries_json must be a JSON array of {key, value, category, importance, tags} objects. Partial failures do not corrupt the store.

entries_json.description: JSON array of memory entry objects, each with key and value required.

tools.name: bb7_memory_categories
tools.description: Get the available memory categories.

tools.name: bb7_memory_concept_network
tools.description: Get the network of memories connected to a concept.

concept.description: The concept to get the network for.

tools.name: bb7_memory_consolidate
tools.description: Consolidate old memories and remove low-importance entries.

age_threshold_days.description: The age in days to consider a memory old.

tools.name: bb7_memory_delete
tools.description: Delete a key from persistent memory.

key.description: The key of the memory to delete.

tools.name: bb7_memory_export
tools.description: Export all memories as Markdown (default) or JSON. Markdown output includes headers, categories, importance badges, tags, and retention scores.

tools.name: bb7_memory_extract_concepts
tools.description: Extract key concepts from text.

text.description: The text to extract concepts from.

tools.name: bb7_memory_get_insights
tools.description: Generate insights about the memory system.

tools.name: bb7_memory_get_related
tools.description: Fetch semantically related memory entries for a given key using BM25. Returns ranked related entries with relevance and retention scores.

key.description: Memory key to find related entries for.

tools.name: bb7_memory_insights
tools.description: Get comprehensive insights about the memory system.

tools.name: bb7_memory_intelligent_search
tools.description: Intelligent search across all memory systems.

max_results.description: The maximum number of results to return.

tools.name: bb7_memory_list
tools.description: Enhanced key listing with filtering and sorting options.

prefix.description: The prefix to filter keys by.

category.description: The category to filter keys by.

min_importance.description: The minimum importance to filter keys by.

sort_by.description: The field to sort keys by.

tools.name: bb7_memory_retrieve
tools.description: Retrieve a value with optional related memories.

key.description: The key of the memory to retrieve.

include_related.description: Whether to include related memories in the response.

tools.name: bb7_memory_search
tools.description: Search memories using intelligent semantic matching.

max_results.description: The maximum number of results to return.

tools.name: bb7_memory_stats
tools.description: Get comprehensive statistics about memory usage.

tools.name: bb7_memory_store
tools.description: Store a key-value pair with enhanced metadata and intelligence.

key.description: The key to store the value under.

importance.description: The importance of the memory (0.0 to 1.0).

tags.description: A list of tags for the memory.

tools.name: bb7_memory_surface_context
tools.description: Proactively surface the most relevant memories for a given context blob using BM25 + Ebbinghaus decay weighting. Call at session start to recover relevant prior knowledge without knowing exact keys.

context_text.description: Current context or task description to match against stored memories.

tools.name: bb7_memory_timeline
tools.description: Chronological view of memories created or updated recently. Shows Ebbinghaus retention score for each entry. Useful for session continuity and auditing recent knowledge changes.

tools.name: bb7_optimization_results
tools.description: Retrieve optimization outcomes and recommended next steps.

include_recommendations.description: Include actionable recommendations in the output.

tools.name: bb7_pause_session
tools.description: Pause the current session.

reason.description: The reason for pausing the session.

tools.name: bb7_performance_optimization
tools.description: Run performance optimization analysis and strategy generation.

optimization_type.description: Optimization mode, e.g. comprehensive or performance.

tools.name: bb7_planner_health
tools.description: Return OpenRouter planner configuration and persistence health.

tools.name: bb7_planner_plan
tools.description: Generate a structured execution plan using OpenRouter.

max_steps.description: Maximum steps allowed in returned plan.

retries.description: Retry count for transient request failures.

dry_run.description: If true, do not call API and return payload preview only.

tools.name: bb7_planner_template
tools.description: Generate a planner prompt template for a target intent.

context.description: Optional context to include in the template.

tools.name: bb7_python_execute_secure
tools.description: Secure Python code execution with sandboxing and audit logging

input_data.description: Optional input data for the code

stateless.description: Whether to run in stateless mode

dry_run.description: Whether to perform a dry run without execution

tools.name: bb7_read_file
tools.description: Read the complete contents of a file.

path.description: The absolute path to the file to read.

tools.name: bb7_record_workflow
tools.description: Record a procedural workflow or pattern.

steps.description: A list of steps in the workflow.

tools.name: bb7_resume_session
tools.description: Resume a paused session.

session_id.description: The ID of the session to resume.

tools.name: bb7_run_command
tools.description: ⚡ Execute shell commands safely with intelligent output analysis, error diagnosis, and security controls. Perfect for development tasks, system administration, and automation. Provides detailed execution results, performance metrics, and actionable suggestions for command optimization and troubleshooting.

working_directory.description: Directory to run command in (defaults to current directory)

tools.name: bb7_screen_monitor
tools.description: 👁️ Monitor screen for changes with intelligent change detection, activity analysis, and automated capture. Perfect for monitoring applications, detecting events, and tracking visual changes during development or testing. Provides comprehensive activity reporting.

tools.name: bb7_search_files
tools.description: Search for files matching a pattern in a directory tree.

directory.description: The absolute path to the directory to search in.

pattern.description: The glob pattern to search for.

max_results.description: The maximum number of results to return.

tools.name: bb7_search_web
tools.description: Simple web search using DuckDuckGo's instant answer API.

num_results.description: The maximum number of results to return.

tools.name: bb7_security_audit
tools.description: Security-focused code analysis to identify vulnerabilities and risks

file_path.description: Path to the Python file to audit

tools.name: bb7_session_intelligence
tools.description: Get the session intelligence data.

tools.name: bb7_session_recommendations
tools.description: Generate intelligent recommendations based on past sessions.

goal.description: The goal of the new session.

tools.name: bb7_show_available_capabilities
tools.description: Display categories and available MCP tools.

category.description: Optional category filter (memory, web, execution, etc.).

tools.name: bb7_start_session
tools.description: Start a new enhanced cognitive session with intelligence.

tags.description: A list of tags for the session.

tools.name: bb7_take_screenshot
tools.description: 📸 Capture screenshots with intelligent analysis, annotation capabilities, and automatic saving. Perfect for documentation, debugging, UI testing, and visual monitoring. Provides comprehensive screen analysis with element detection, color analysis, and visual insights for development workflows.

save_path.description: Custom path to save screenshot (auto-generated if not provided)

include_analysis.description: Include visual analysis of the captured image

tools.name: bb7_update_focus
tools.description: Update current attention focus and energy state.

focus_areas.description: A list of areas to focus on.

tools.name: bb7_window_info
tools.description: 🪟 Get comprehensive information about active windows and applications with intelligent analysis and management suggestions. Perfect for window management, application monitoring, and development environment optimization. Provides detailed window properties and actionable insights.

tools.name: bb7_workspace_context_loader
tools.description: Load all relevant workspace context for session continuity.

include_recent_memories.description: Include recent memory keys in the report.

include_active_sessions.description: Include active and paused session summary.

tools.name: bb7_write_file
tools.description: Write content to a file, creating directories as needed.

path.description: The absolute path to the file to write.

content.description: The content to write to the file.

tools.name: ping_server
tools.description: Checks if the Sovereign MCP server is alive and reachable

tools.name: bb7_agent_health
tools.description: Return agent integration health with canon data dir info. Shows available agents, tool registry status, and execution state.

tools.name: bb7_agent_list
tools.description: List all available agents (planner, debugger, analyzer, doc) with their capabilities and tools.

tools.name: bb7_agent_capabilities
tools.description: Get specific agent capabilities including available MCP tools and max iterations.

agent_type.description: Agent type: planner, debugger, analyzer, or doc

tools.name: bb7_agent_nodes
tools.description: List all active agent nodes in the distributed cognitive plane.

tools.name: bb7_agent_messages
tools.description: Get messages from the cognitive plane for cross-agent communication.

tools.name: bb7_agent_handoff
tools.description: Hand off to another agent with shared context. Enables cross-agent collaboration in distributed cognitive plane.

to_agent.description: Target agent type (planner, debugger, analyzer, doc)

context.description: Context to pass to target agent

tools.name: bb7_agent_call
tools.description: Call another agent (non-blocking) for parallel execution.

agent_type.description: Agent to call (planner, debugger, analyzer, doc)

tools.name: bb7_agent_run
tools.description: Run agent with ACTUAL tool execution in distributed cognitive plane. Agents execute MCP tools, not just plan. Uses canon data dir for shared state.

agent_type.description: Agent type: planner, debugger, analyzer, or doc

tools.name: bb7_agent_status
tools.description: Get status of all active agent nodes in the distributed cognitive plane.
